head: eb618ac
fixes_applied: Round 1 — CRITICAL (technical+product): lost flow backend implementation (Zod schema + completeSession extension; status→RETIRED, Repair WROTE_OFF, audit UNIT_LOST/STATUS_CHANGED, optional BookingItem compensation with replacementCost fallback, BOOKING_CHARGE_ADDED audit, recomputeBookingFinance)
Round 1 — IMPORTANT I1: addExtraItem wrapped in $transaction with upsert + booking.status guard (409 BOOKING_LOCKED for non-DRAFT/CONFIRMED/ISSUED)
Round 1 — IMPORTANT I2: HttpError replaces plain Error throughout checklistService (proper 4xx codes)
Round 1 — IMPORTANT I3: checkUnit validates unit reservation ownership for RETURN (substitution still allowed for ISSUE per existing semantics)
Round 1 — Product CONCERN: removed auto-popup RecordPaymentModal in summary (mockup 05 update)
Round 1 — MINOR M1/M2/M3: audit/recompute catches log errors; getChecklistState orderBy createdAt
Round 2 — IMPORTANT: uncheckUnit straggler bare Error → HttpError(409, SESSION_NOT_ACTIVE)
Round 2 — IMPORTANT: lost-unit loop wrapped in try/catch per iteration, partial failures surface in result.failedLostUnits[] (mirrors broken-unit pattern)
Round 2 — MINOR: replacementCost fallback skips BookingItem when 0 (prevents silent under-collection); console.warn
Round 2 — MINOR: dead brainstorm comments cleanup in checklistService.ts (~57 lines → 3 lines)
notes: User intent: «убрали сканер из всей этой системы, чекбоксами отмечал что выдано и потом принято обратно... 1 в 1 как ты нарисовал на мокапах».
Полная замена scanner-based UI на checkbox checklist: 5-step wizard (login → operation → booking → checklist → summary).
Mobile-first 390px design, sticky header + sticky CTA, FAB для quick-add bottom sheet.
ProblemModal с табами Поломка / Утеря (новый): poломка → Repair, утеря → status RETIRED + опц. компенсация клиенту.
4 новых backend endpoints: GET /state, POST /check, POST /uncheck, POST /items (quick-add).
/complete расширен полем lostUnits[] (Zod-validated): UNIT_LOST + UNIT_STATUS_CHANGED + опционально BOOKING_CHARGE_ADDED audit.
Camera scanner удалён из flow; BarcodeScanner.tsx сохранён (используется в /admin/scanner и /equipment/[id]/units).
Initial PAR: product NEEDS_FIXES (3), technical REQUEST_CHANGES (4 important + 3 minor). Round 1 fix-pass HEAD 07c196e. Round 2 fix-pass HEAD eb618ac. Final: product ACCEPTED, technical APPROVE.
